title: France
context: Paris is the capital and largest city of France. France is a country in Western Europe.

title: Solar system
context: Mars is often called the Red Planet because of iron oxide on its surface. Earth is the third planet from the Sun.

title: Arithmetic
context: Basic addition: two plus two equals four. Numbers are fundamental in mathematics.

title: Literature
context: William Shakespeare wrote Hamlet, a tragedy about the Prince of Denmark. He was an English playwright.

title: Chemistry
context: Water has the chemical formula H2O, consisting of two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.

title: Misc
context: Random facts: the sky appears blue due to Rayleigh scattering. Oxygen is essential for respiration.
